title: Meenammaa Song Lyrics Aasai
stanzas: <div>Meenammaa Song Lyrics Aasai

Meenammaa
adhi kaalaiyilum
andhi maalaiyilum
undhan niyaabagame

ammammaa
mudhal paarvaiyile
sonna vaarthai ellaam
oru kaaviyame

chinna chinna oodalgalum
chinna chinna modhalgalum
minnal pola
vandhu vandhu pogum

modhal vandhu oodal vandhu
mutti konda podhum ingu
kadhal mattum kaayam
indri vazhum

idhu madhangal  natkal sella
niram maaridum pookkal alla
Meenammaa..

Oru chinna poo thiriyil
oli sindhum raathiriyil
indha meththaimel
ilam thaththai por
pudhu vithai kaattida vaa

oru jannal angirukku
thendral etti paarpadharku
adhai moodaamal
thazh podaamal
enai thottu theenduvadhaa

maaman kaaran thaane
maalai potta naane
moga theerave
thiruvaai thiruvaai thodalaam

Meenammaa...
mazhai unnai ninaikka
ingu enakkallavaa
kulir kaaichal varum

ammammaa
veyil unnai anaithaal
ingu enakallavaa
udal verthuvidum

Andru kadhal panniydhu
undhan kannam killiyadhu
adi ippodhum niram maaramal
indha nenjil nirkkiradhu

andru pattu selaigalum
nagai nattum paathiramum
unnai kaetene sandai pottene
adhu kannil nirkkiradhu

jaadhi malli poove
thanga vennilaave
aasai theerave pesalaam
mudhalnaal iravu.

Meenammaa
unai nesikkavum
anbil vaasikkavum
thendral kaathirukka

ammammaa
unnai kadhalithu
buthi bethalaithu
.. poothirukku

unnai thotta thendral vandhu
enna thottu ennennavo
sangathigal sollivittu poga

un manamum en manamum
ondrai ondru yetrukondu
oppanthathil kaiezhuthu poda

indru mogana paatteduthom
mulu moochudan kadhalithom
Meenammaa
adhi kaalaiyilum
andhi maalaiyilum
undhan niyaabagame

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Meenammaa?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting on cherished memories.

In which movie is Meenammaa featured?

Aasai is the movie where this beautiful song is featured.

Who are the singers of Meenammaa?

The song is sung by Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for Meenammaa?

The music for this song was composed by Deva.

When was Meenammaa released?

The song was released on September 8, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Aasai, the song Meenammaa serves as a poignant reflection of love and memories. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, capturing the beauty of fleeting moments shared between lovers. With its soothing melody and heartfelt vocals, the song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. It beautifully conveys emotions of longing and affection, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Meenammaa is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia, beautifully composed by Deva. The enchanting vocals of Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan bring the lyrics to life, making it a perfect romantic ballad. Dive into the world of Aasai and let the soothing tunes transport you to a place of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Meenammaa, your memories are there in both the morning and evening.
Every word spoken during the first glance is like a poem.
Small quarrels and small beginnings come and go like lightning.
When the first quarrel comes and goes, love here lives without any permanence.
These are days of sweetness, flowers that change color are not here.
A small flower sings in the breeze at night, showing new seeds on this earth.
There is a window where the breeze blows, without closing it, will it touch me?
I am the one who put the garland, to end the confusion, let’s begin again.
Meenammaa... thinking of you brings a coolness to my heart.
Oh grandmother, the sun will burn you, will it take away my body?
Once love was done, your eyes are like a bird, even now this heart remains unchanged.
Once the songs of love and the vessels of joy were heard, I ask for you, it remains in my eyes.
The jasmine flower, the golden moon, let’s talk about desires that have no end since the beginning of the night.
Meenammaa, the breeze waits to love you and live in affection.
Oh grandmother, loving you has become a habit... it blooms.
The breeze that touches you tells me stories as it goes.
Your heart and my heart are intertwined, let’s write together in this bond.
Today we sang a song of love, with all our hearts, Meenammaa, your memories are there in both the morning and evening.
